data.title: BCB Bancorp Q3 Earnings And Revenues Surpass Estimates
data.description: BCB Bancorp (NASDAQ: BCBP) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.36 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.32 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.39 per share a year ago. These figures are adjusted for non-recurring items.

data.title: Amazon Prime Offers 2024 Election Night Coverage With Brian Williams Special And It's Free For Non-Subscribers
data.description: Amazon is testing the political waters with a live election night special on Nov. 5 featuring Brian Williams and it will be free for non-subscribers.
